attacking_style: Not an attacker. Gains time through team time trial performances rather than individual offensive moves. Benefits from early race opportunities and team strength.
team_tactics: DSM designates him as ceremonial leader to inherit race lead from TTT victories. Team deploys him as red jersey bearer for sprint stages rather than GC protection.
terrain_preference: Team time trials in technical conditions where DSM's collective strength delivers results. Vulnerable on any individual climbing or sustained racing efforts.
vulnerability: Cannot defend race leads beyond opening stages. Abandoned Vuelta despite holding red jersey, suggesting inability to handle stage race demands or physical fragility under pressure.
key_patterns: Inherits race lead from DSM TTT wins rather than individual performance (2 instances)
Designated team leader for ceremonial purposes, not genuine GC contention (2 instances)
Abandoned Grand Tour despite holding red jersey, indicating preparation or durability issues
Benefits from favorable TTT conditions: early start slots, wet technical courses (2 instances)
form_trajectory: negative: Abandoned Vuelta 2023 immediately after inheriting red jersey, suggesting serious physical or health issues despite strong TTT platform
